title: End of the Trip 旅行结束
scene: 旅行结束了，一家人在回家的车上聊旅行感受。

lines.en: Well, that was a wonderful trip! How did you like it, Lucy?
lines.zh: 这次旅行真棒！你觉得怎么样，露西？

lines.en: I loved every minute of it! The Great Wall was my favorite part.
lines.zh: 每一分钟我都喜欢！长城是我最喜欢的部分。

lines.en: Mine too! You were so brave climbing all those steps.
lines.zh: 我也是！你爬了那么多台阶真勇敢。

lines.en: My legs are still sore, but it was worth it!
lines.zh: 我的腿还酸着呢，但值得！

lines.en: What about the food? Did you enjoy the Peking duck?
lines.zh: 食物呢？你喜欢北京烤鸭吗？

lines.en: Oh, it was delicious! Can we have it at home too?
lines.zh: 哦，太美味了！我们在家也能吃吗？

lines.en: Maybe! Mom can try to make it. What was your second favorite thing?
lines.zh: 也许可以！妈妈可以试着做。你第二喜欢的是什么？

lines.en: The museum! I learned so much about history.
lines.zh: 博物馆！我学到了很多历史知识。

lines.en: I'm glad you had fun and learned something too!
lines.zh: 我很高兴你既玩得开心又学到了东西！

lines.en: Thank you, Mom and Dad! This is the best trip ever! Let's go again next year!
lines.zh: 谢谢爸爸妈妈！这是最棒的旅行！我们明年再去吧！
